name: Central Asia
description: Glacial and landslide-dammed lakes in the Pamirs and Tien Shan ranges of Tajikistan, Kyrgyzstan, and Kazakhstan. Includes Sarez Lake (the largest landslide-dammed lake on Earth, holding ~16 km3 of water behind a 567m natural dam), Yashilkul (Holocene landslide-dammed lake on the Gunt River), the annually-draining Merzbacher Lake on the Inylchek glacier, and Lake Issyk where the 1963 Kazakhstan disaster occurred.
source: USGS + GLOFCA Atlas of Glacial Lakes of Tajikistan + published case studies
sources: Schuster, R. L., Alford, D. (2004). Usoi Landslide Dam and Lake Sarez, Pamir Mountains, Tajikistan. Environmental & Engineering Geoscience, 10(2), 151-168.
Risley, J. C., Walder, J. S., Denlinger, R. P. (2006). Usoi Dam wave overtopping and flood routing in the Bartang and Panj rivers, Tajikistan. Natural Hazards, 38, 375-390.
Ng, F., Liu, S., Mavlyudov, B., Wang, Y. (2007). Climatic control on the peak discharge of glacier outburst floods. Geophysical Research Letters, 34, L21503. (Merzbacher)
Mayer, C., Lambrecht, A., Hagg, W., Smiraglia, C., Diolaiuti, G. (2008). Glaciological characteristics of the ablation zone of Baltoro glacier, Karakoram, Pakistan.

Shangguan, D., Liu, S., Ding, Y., et al. (2017). Quick release of internal water storage in a glacier leads to underestimation of the hazard potential of glacial lake outburst floods from Lake Merzbacher in central Tian Shan Mountains. Geophysical Research Letters, 44, 9786-9795.

Mergili, M., Schneider, J. F. (2011). Regional-scale analysis of lake outburst hazards in the southwestern Pamir, Tajikistan, based on remote sensing and GIS. Natural Hazards and Earth System Sciences, 11, 1447-1462. (Yashilkul + Pamir lakes)
Komatsu, G., Arzhannikov, S. G., Arzhannikova, A. V., Ershov, K. (2010). Geomorphology of subglacial drumlins, Yashilkul-Bulunkul system, Pamir, Tajikistan. Geomorphology, 122(1-2), 12-23.
GLOFCA (2022). Atlas of Glacial Lakes of Tajikistan. https://glofca.org/
Yafyazova, R. (2007). Mudflow hazard in the foothills of Northern Tien Shan: 1963 Issyk disaster reassessment.
USGS (2007). Usoi Landslide Dam and Lake Sarez - An assessment of hazard and risk in the Pamir Mountains, Tajikistan. UNDRR/USGS Joint Assessment Report.
